name: Mace of Disruption
entries: When you hit a Fiend or an Undead with this magic weapon, that creature takes an extra {@damage 2d6} Radiant damage. If the target has 25 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} or fewer after taking this damage, it must succeed on a {@dc 15} Wisdom saving throw or be destroyed. On a successful save, the creature has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of your next turn.

entries.name: Light
entries: While you hold this weapon, it sheds {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 20-foot radius and {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB} for an additional 20 feet.
